Our Story

Beauty Refined Through Experience

At New Look Salon, beauty is an art form — refined over two decades of passion, precision, and care. Led by Annee, with over 18 years of deep expertise in the beauty industry, our salon is founded on trust, skill, and a genuine understanding of what truly suits you.

Every client steps into a warm, considered space and receives treatment that is thoughtfully tailored — never rushed, never generic. From nourishing facials and spa therapies to precision hair transformations, we offer everything under one roof.

Our specialties span keratin, nanoplastia, hair botox, balayage, and bespoke coloring — each executed with the quiet confidence that only two decades of dedicated practice can build.

"We don't just enhance your look —
we elevate your confidence."
18+Years Experience
50+Beauty Services
7Days a Week

What We Offer

Curated Services

A complete beauty experience — from everyday indulgences to extraordinary transformations.

Skin & Care

🌿

Luxury Facials

Tailored treatments that deeply cleanse, hydrate, and restore your skin's natural luminosity.

🛁

Spa Treatments

Indulgent body rituals designed to melt away stress and completely revive your senses.

Hands & Feet

💅

Manicures

From classic polish to gel extensions — impeccable nail care crafted with precision.

🦶

Pedicures

Restorative foot treatments that leave you soft, clean, and beautifully finished.

Hair

💆

Keratin Treatment

Smooth, frizz-free results that last for months — restoring shine and effortless manageability.

✨

Nanoplastia

Advanced protein smoothing that deeply nourishes while perfectly reconstructing each hair fibre.

💎

Hair Botox

Deep conditioning therapy that fills porosity and delivers glass-like brilliance from root to tip.

🎨

Precision Coloring

Expert colour from rich all-overs to bespoke multi-tonal techniques, applied with artisan care.

🌅

Balayage & Streaking

Hand-painted sun-kissed dimension — strikingly natural and uniquely yours.

🔬

Hair Treatments

Targeted strengthening and restorative therapies tailored to your specific hair concern.

Makeup & Styling

🪞

Soft Everyday Makeup

Effortlessly refined looks for daily wear — polished, fresh, and perfectly balanced.

🎉

Party Glam

Bold, luminous, camera-ready looks designed to turn every head in the room.

📸

Model Makeup

Editorial and high-fashion artistry executed with professional-grade precision and product.

💍

Bridal Makeup

Your most important day deserves perfection — flawless, enduring, and entirely your own.

🌹

Reception Makeup

Elegant, photogenic looks that transition seamlessly from ceremony to celebration.

👑

Hairstyles

From intricate bridal updos to relaxed waves — hairstyling that elevates every look.

Our Work

A Portfolio of Transformations

Every result is a reflection of individuality — beautifully, intentionally refined.

🔒
Client Privacy & Confidentiality

We take the privacy of our clients very seriously. Out of deep respect for each person we serve, we have chosen not to display any photographs of our makeup services online. If you would like to see examples of our makeup artistry, we warmly invite you to visit us at the salon or reach out to arrange a private consultation.

Client Stories

Words That Inspire Us

★★★★★

"I came in for my bridal makeup and left feeling like an absolute queen. Annee has this rare gift — she doesn't just make you look beautiful, she makes you truly feel it. My photographs were stunning, and my skin glowed all day long. I would recommend New Look Salon to every bride in Karachi without a moment's hesitation."

Sana Fatima
★★★★★

"I've been coming here for keratin treatments for two years now and I simply cannot imagine going anywhere else. The results are always smooth, natural, and long-lasting. The salon has such a calm, sophisticated atmosphere — every single visit is a genuine pleasure."

Mehwish Tariq
★★★★★

"The balayage Annee did on my hair exceeded everything I had imagined. She truly listened to what I wanted and then made it even better. The colour blended so naturally — everyone keeps asking where I get my hair done. New Look Salon is genuinely on another level entirely."

Hira Noor
★★★★★

"I visited for a facial and spa treatment and it was absolutely transformative. The care and attention I received was unlike anything I have experienced elsewhere. My skin has never looked this radiant. The ambiance, the professionalism, the results — everything about New Look is first class."

Zara Khalid
